title: 08544_Robust_CLIP_Unsupervised_Adversarial_Fine-Tuning_of_Vision_Embeddings_for_Robust_Large_Vision-Language_Models
positive_examples: The robust models can help in making the deployment of LVLMs more safe.
negative_examples: Transfer attacks can successfully target LVLMs, stressing the importance of having a robust vision encoder.
Attacks can be enabled even on closed-source LVLMs.
